case_title: MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT INC. VS IBCS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $877.44 FILED BY MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT INC. AS TO DEFENDANT IBCS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $3.25 ACCRUED INTEREST, $106.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT IBCS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT IBCS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IBCS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IBCS $371.24 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $371.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IBCS PLAITNIFF TO KEEP $371.24 DEPOSIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
